commands: bash -c 'set -e; echo "=== STEP 3: RUN SYSTEM ==="; cd /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system; if [ -f docker-compose.yml ]; then docker-compose up -d --build; elif [ -f infra/docker-compose.yml ]; then cd infra && docker-compose up -d --build; else echo "docker-compose.yml not found"; exit 1; fi; echo "=== STEP 4: VERIFY CONTAINERS ==="; docker ps -a'
